title: camt053-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol server for the camt053 ISO 20022 bank-statement library. Exposes 11 tools over stdio for message-type discovery, return-reason lookup, schema discovery, payment-record validation, IBAN/BIC identifier validation, camt.053 statement parsing and XSD validation, entry listing and filtering, and one-shot generation of validated reversing-entry XML. All tools are thin typed wrappers over the shared camt053.services facade, sigstore-attested releases.
